app.name: 2048 for Windows
app.description: Play the most flexible version of 2048 yet! 2048 is a simple but addictive game where you move tiles of numbers. If matching numbers hit they merge into larger numbers. You win the game if you create a 2048 tile. 2048 for Windows allows you to set the size of the field between 4x4 and 7x7 and set your own goal. Practice and try to reach 128 or go wild and set it to 8192! To move the tiles you can use the arrow key, swipe with your fingers on a touch device or click and drag your mouse in the appropriate direction. Endless play is supported! Just continue playing after you have reached your goal!
